alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-30229 - Parse Server: Endpoint `/loginAs` allows `r"; content:"CVE-2026-30229"; nocase; sid:9600522; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-29182 - Parse Server: Cloud Hooks and Cloud Jobs by"; content:"CVE-2026-29182"; nocase; sid:1123163; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 10 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 5 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, CDB-FIN-12. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
